'''zhadacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oesophagectomy|oesophagectomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oesophagectomy|oesophagectomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhadacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædæchæth|zhædæchæth]] || [[word:zhædæchæj|zhædæchæj]] || [[word:zhædæchæsh|zhædæchæsh]] || [[word:zhædæchæ|zhædæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadadachath|zhadadachath]] || [[word:zhadadachaj|zhadadachaj]] || [[word:zhadadachash|zhadadachash]] || [[word:zhadadacha|zhadadacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadachath|zhadachath]] || [[word:zhadachaj|zhadachaj]] || [[word:zhadachash|zhadachash]] || [[word:zhadacha|zhadacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadafchath|zhadafchath]] || [[word:zhadafchaj|zhadafchaj]] || [[word:zhadafchash|zhadafchash]] || [[word:zhadafchaf|zhadafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadachatha|zhadachatha]] || [[word:zhadachaja|zhadachaja]] || [[word:zhadachasha|zhadachasha]] || [[word:zhadachaka|zhadachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadachath|zhadachath]] || [[word:zhadachaj|zhadachaj]] || [[word:zhadachash|zhadachash]] || [[word:zhadacha|zhadacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadachathal|zhadachathal]] || [[word:zhadachajal|zhadachajal]] || [[word:zhadachashal|zhadachashal]] || [[word:zhadachakal|zhadachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadachathatha|zhadachathatha]] || [[word:zhadachajaja|zhadachajaja]] || [[word:zhadachashasha|zhadachashasha]] || [[word:zhadachaka|zhadachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadachathan|zhadachathan]] || [[word:zhadachajan|zhadachajan]] || [[word:zhadachashan|zhadachashan]] || [[word:zhadachakan|zhadachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadachathaoro|zhadachathaoro]] || [[word:zhadachajaoro|zhadachajaoro]] || [[word:zhadachashaoro|zhadachashaoro]] || [[word:zhadachakaoro|zhadachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
